name: browser-control
description: Browser automation via Playwright. Navigate, click, fill, scroll, press keys, snapshot, scrape, screenshot, capture console — isolated sessions by default. Core feature, ALWAYS ON: enabled_by_default=true is honored at runtime via Layer D in opencomputer/plugins/registry.py — even profiles with a narrow explicit `enabled: [...]` list still load this plugin. WebFetch alone returns empty HTML shells for SPA / client-rendered pages, so the agent needs this to read modern websites.
author: OpenComputer
